title: M20 Netcode rework — pick a proven model & rebuild own-drone authority
summary: Three bugs surfaced together in Sprint 32 (own-drone runs 2× the server-broadcast position; 30s server idle timeout disconnects steady players; networked controls feel different from single-player). Current "rollback-replay with replayUnackedIntents" is mixed-source-of-truth — PlayerInputSystem moves the drone locally AND network-drone-sync lerps it toward server + replay, double-counting in-flight intents. Investigation lands as docs/research/netcode-rework-investigation.md (done Sprint 32); recommendation is client-authoritative own player (Option E). Implementation sequenced as M20-a → M20-l across 2 sprints.
notes: Auto-migrated from HIGH_LEVEL_BACKLOG.md → "Must-Have Engine Gaps (from `Notes/codex_review_1.md` M-section)" table on 2026-05-18.
